description: Add a first-class stack-side template check and document/use it from the project template.
acceptance: Stack exposes a command that validates the sibling/template repo contract from the stack CLI.
Automated tests cover the stack/template pairing command.
The public template can run checks when the stack repo is missing by bootstrapping it.

evidence.summary: python3 cli/go.py template-check ../go-project-template --json ok=true; make check passed; pytest -q passed (8 passed)
